# JCBlaise Real-Names Blocklist (Seed / Fallback)
# Generated: 2026-05-04 (curated seed)
# Source: Curated from documented PH political family surnames
#   (Arugay & Baquisal 2022 Pacific Affairs 95(3),
#    Mendoza et al. 2012 Philippine Political Science Journal 33(2),
#    BATB_CompiledThesisPaper section 1.5 Limitation #2)
#
# This is a SEED blocklist for first-run safety. The canonical blocklist
# should be regenerated by running scripts/34_extract_jcblaise_names.py
# on Google Colab (where HuggingFace Hub is reachable). That run will
# replace this file with names actually present in the JCBlaise training
# corpus, sized by their occurrence count.
#
# Used by scripts/33_strict_name_allowlist.py to block any of these
# real-PH names from leaking into game card output.
# Format: one lowercase name per line. Blank lines and lines starting
# with # are ignored.

# Major political dynasties
marcos
bongbong
bongbong marcos
ferdinand marcos
imee marcos
imee
bbm
imelda
imelda marcos
duterte
rodrigo duterte
sara duterte
sara
inday sara
sebastian duterte
aquino
cory aquino
cory
ninoy aquino
ninoy
noynoy aquino
noynoy
arroyo
gloria arroyo
gloria macapagal arroyo
mike arroyo
estrada
joseph estrada
erap
jinggoy estrada
jv ejercito
ejercito
macapagal
diosdado macapagal

# Senate / national figures
binay
jejomar binay
nancy binay
abby binay
robredo
leni robredo
leni
jesse robredo
roxas
mar roxas
korina sanchez
pacquiao
manny pacquiao
lacson
panfilo lacson
ping lacson
poe
grace poe
fpj
fernando poe
sotto
tito sotto
vicente sotto
drilon
franklin drilon
enrile
juan ponce enrile
jpe
lapid
lito lapid
pimentel
koko pimentel
nene pimentel
cayetano
alan cayetano
pia cayetano
trillanes
antonio trillanes
honasan
gringo honasan
villar
manny villar
cynthia villar
mark villar
revilla
bong revilla
ramon revilla
angara
sonny angara
edgardo angara
escudero
chiz escudero
gordon
dick gordon
recto
ralph recto
legarda
loren legarda
pangilinan
kiko pangilinan

# Mayoral / city figures with national reach
isko
isko moreno
francisco moreno domagoso
yorme
vico sotto

# Pink campaign figures (2022)
kiko
chel diokno
heart evangelista

# Defunct but historically associated names
miriam santiago
miriam defensor
miriam

# Common personal-name patterns from PH political discourse
juan dela cruz
santiago

# Note: This seed deliberately does NOT include common Filipino first
# names (Maria, Jose, Pedro, etc.) without a surname, since those are
# too generic and would create excessive false positives. Script 34 on
# the actual JCBlaise corpus will produce a more empirically-targeted
# list.
